patterns.description: Interactive elements (dropdown triggers) inside clickable parents (buttons) cause event bubbling — clicking the inner element also fires the parent's onClick. Always stopPropagation on nested interactive triggers.
Server component env vars passed as props to client components get serialized into HTML/JS. Test credentials should only be exposed in local dev, never on deployed previews.
Stub actions with console.log ship noise to production. Use silent no-ops for unimplemented menu items.
Clean provider pattern in menu-context.tsx — single MenuContent component works for both DropdownMenu and ContextMenu via context provider. Avoids duplicating menu content for two trigger types.
Overlays hidden via opacity-0 still capture pointer events, blocking clicks on elements underneath. Always pair opacity-0 with pointer-events-none and restore pointer-events-auto when visible.
localStorage/sessionStorage writes can throw (quota exceeded, private browsing). Always wrap setItem in try/catch, especially when the read side is already guarded.
Using div as DropdownMenuTrigger makes the control unreachable for keyboard users. Use button with type=button and aria-label instead.

Persisted collapsed state computed independently of whether the group IS collapsible. When only one group remains, persisted keys hide items with no UI affordance to expand. Gate isCollapsed on isCollapsible.
